description_long: This is a heavy-duty hammer featuring a robust, rectangular black metal head with flat striking faces on both ends. The head is securely mounted on a thick, slightly curved wooden handle that shows a natural wood grain and some discoloration from use. The handle is rounded and tapers slightly towards the end, providing a comfortable grip for swinging. The metal head appears solid and dense, with a matte finish and some minor surface imperfections. The wood handle displays visible wear, including scuffs and a slightly roughened texture, especially near the base. This tool is utilitarian in design, suitable for demanding tasks such as breaking concrete or driving stakes in urban construction or maintenance settings.
description: A sturdy hammer with a black rectangular metal head and a worn, curved wooden handle, showing signs of heavy use. The tool is practical and built for tough urban tasks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the hammer, highlighting the rectangular black metal head and the curved wooden handle.
description_view_1: End-on view of the hammer's head, emphasizing the width of the striking face and the rounded end of the wooden handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the other face of the metal head and the handle's curvature.
description_view_3: Top-down view of the hammer's head, showing the thickness of the metal and the way the handle is fitted into the head.
attribute_handle_type: curved wooden handle with a natural finish, rounded and slightly tapered, showing visible grain and wear
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledge-type head with flat striking faces on both ends, made of blackened steel
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: visible wear on the wooden handle, including scuffs and discoloration; minor surface imperfections on the metal head
